statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft AppPrivacy administrative template
links.summary: The local AppPrivacy administrative template documents many LetAppsAccess* policy values, including 2 for ForceDeny and 0 for user control.

links.title: Current privacy provider broad deny bundle
links.summary: The provider writes a large AppPrivacy ForceDeny bundle plus AllowUserInfoAccess and a microphone exception.
